C

Card - Class in com.examplez.demo.Model
Immutable-in-practice representation of one card used by the game model.
Card(int, String) - Constructor for class com.examplez.demo.Model.Card
Creates a card with its rule value and resource identifier.
cardPlayed(int, int) - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.PlayerMachine
Selects the first valid card found in the machine player's hand.
changeView() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Controller.MenuController
Loads the game view, transfers the stage and player count to its controller, and replaces the current menu scene.
changeView(int) - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Controller.PlayController
Loads the final view and passes the winner identifier to its controller.
com.examplez.demo - module com.examplez.demo
 
com.examplez.demo - package com.examplez.demo
 
com.examplez.demo.Controller - package com.examplez.demo.Controller
 
com.examplez.demo.Model - package com.examplez.demo.Model
 
controlTurnTask() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Controller.PlayController
Builds the background task that controls successive player turns until only one participant remains.
createThreadTurnTask() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Controller.PlayController
Creates and starts the daemon thread that executes the turn loop.
